answer:
Buffy's friends ignore her because they are more concerned with their upcoming school dance and refuse to understand her new responsibilities as the Slayer. When she tries to explain her experiences, they dismiss her as they are focused on their own immature, selfish concerns. This leads to Buffy realizing she has outgrown their shallow behavior.  

\boxed{\text{Buffy's friends ignore her because they are preoccupied with the school dance and refuse to understand her Slayer duties.}}
